Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Class RenderContext

Namespace
Pandowdy.EmuCore
Assembly
Pandowdy.EmuCore.dll

Context for rendering a single video frame, containing frame buffer, memory access, and system status.

public class RenderContext
Inheritance
object
RenderContext
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

One-Shot Lifetime: A RenderContext is valid only until it is committed via RenderFrame(RenderContext). After commit, the context is automatically invalidated and attempting to use it will throw InvalidOperationException.

Usage Pattern: 

var context = frameGenerator.AllocateRenderContext();  // Valid
frameGenerator.RenderFrame(context);                    // Commits and invalidates
// context is now invalid - do not reuse!

Reference Type: RenderContext is a class (reference type), so invalidation state is naturally shared across all references to the same instance.

Thread Safety: Not thread-safe. A context should be used by a single thread from allocation through commit.

Constructors

RenderContext(BitmapDataArray, IDirectMemoryPoolReader, ISystemStatusProvider)

Context for rendering a single video frame, containing frame buffer, memory access, and system status.

public RenderContext(BitmapDataArray frameBuffer, IDirectMemoryPoolReader memory, ISystemStatusProvider status)

Parameters

frameBuffer BitmapDataArray

The frame buffer where pixels will be written during rendering.

memory IDirectMemoryPoolReader

Direct memory access for reading video RAM (main and auxiliary banks).

status ISystemStatusProvider

System status provider for reading soft switch states.

Remarks

One-Shot Lifetime: A RenderContext is valid only until it is committed via RenderFrame(RenderContext). After commit, the context is automatically invalidated and attempting to use it will throw InvalidOperationException.

Usage Pattern: 

var context = frameGenerator.AllocateRenderContext();  // Valid
frameGenerator.RenderFrame(context);                    // Commits and invalidates
// context is now invalid - do not reuse!

Reference Type: RenderContext is a class (reference type), so invalidation state is naturally shared across all references to the same instance.

Thread Safety: Not thread-safe. A context should be used by a single thread from allocation through commit.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if any parameter is null. All dependencies are required.

Properties

FrameBuffer

Frame buffer where pixels are written during rendering.

public BitmapDataArray FrameBuffer { get; }

Property Value

BitmapDataArray

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing the frame buffer after the context has been invalidated (committed).

IsHiRes

Gets whether hi-res graphics mode is active.

public bool IsHiRes { get; }

Property Value

bool

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing after the context has been invalidated (committed).

IsInvalidated

Gets a value indicating whether this context has been invalidated (committed).

public bool IsInvalidated { get; }

Property Value

bool

Remarks

Once a context is invalidated, it cannot be used for rendering or buffer access. A new context must be allocated via AllocateRenderContext().

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if any parameter is null. All dependencies are required.

IsMixed

Gets whether mixed mode is active (text bottom, graphics top).

public bool IsMixed { get; }

Property Value

bool

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing after the context has been invalidated (committed).

IsPage2

Gets whether page 2 is active (affects which video memory page is displayed).

public bool IsPage2 { get; }

Property Value

bool

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing after the context has been invalidated (committed).

IsTextMode

Gets whether the current video mode is text mode.

public bool IsTextMode { get; }

Property Value

bool

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing after the context has been invalidated (committed).

Memory

Direct memory access for reading video RAM (main and auxiliary banks).

public IDirectMemoryPoolReader Memory { get; }

Property Value

IDirectMemoryPoolReader

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing memory after the context has been invalidated (committed).

SystemStatus

System status provider for reading soft switch states (video mode, page selection, etc.).

public ISystemStatusProvider SystemStatus { get; }

Property Value

ISystemStatusProvider

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when accessing system status after the context has been invalidated (committed).

Methods

ClearBuffer()

Clears the frame buffer (resets all pixels to black/background).

public void ClearBuffer()

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when called after the context has been invalidated (committed).
